creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Craving for Filipino food or want to introduce our cuisine to a non-Pinoy friend? Head over to Kooya! 

What we love:
🏡 cozy interior 
😃 warm and fast service
🍗 Filipino food that makes us proud 

What we had:
* Pineapple Dilis
* Tostadong Bulalo
* Chicken Inasal
* Calamansi Mint and Pomegranate Cooler

💸 Approximate spend for two: 150 AED

Thank you for bringing #FilipinoFoodForward, @kooyafilipinoeatery and @chefjayps! 

Have you been to Kooya? What should we try next time? Comment your recommendations.

transcription.text: Oh, baby, you, you got what I need You got everything I need You're like medicine to me Oh, baby
